name: Cheever, Louise
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Cruze, Grant
description: There has been much discussion as to why he came back for his C. E., but only one conclusion has been drawn.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Moss, Lowell R.
clubs: Chief Flunky for the Chemistry Department
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Roark, Granville W., Jr.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Lawson, Lillian
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Woody, L. D.
motto: "Love me, love my dog."
description: Aside from one short story published in the Arkansan, we have been unable to discover anything unusual that he has ever done.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Andrews, M.
motto: "Pray, Danny, please to moderate the rancour of your tongue! Why flash those sparks of fury from your eyes? Remember, when the judgment's weak the prejudice is strong."
description: One of the leaders in the reformation in hazing.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Adams, Noah
motto: "A youth to fortune and to fame unknown."
description: Until he was suddenly elected to the presidency of the class to fill Dowdle's unexpired term.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Adams, Elizabeth
motto: "So Nature wrote her charms upon thy face,— The cheeks bright bloom, the lips envermeilled dye, And every gay and every witching grace That youth's warm hours and beauty's store supply."
description: Elizabeth has made herself famous in U. of A. history by being the first girl to hold the position of Editor-in-Chief of the Weekly.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Wolf, W. H.
motto: "The boy with that grave mathematical look."
description: The girls say that he is shy, but such a good dancer!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Berry, B. M.
motto: "His wit invites you by his looks to come, But when you knock it never is at home."
description: About all we know concerning him is that he is a farmer and especially fond of the girls.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Boyd, Frances Leone
motto: "Poetry is the blossom and fragrance of all human knowledge, human thoughts, passions, emotions."
description: And Frances' college career prophesies well for her future as a poet. Many of her poems have excited a great deal of wondering comment and praise.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Bryant, Anna
motto: "She doeth little kindnesses Which most leave undone or despise; For naught that sets one heart at ease, Is low esteemed in her eyes."
description: "Anna" has worked hard in all her class activities since she was a Freshman, and her class has always honored her with an office.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Brennan, Mildred
motto: "Modest and shy as a nun is she."
description: She is known chiefly for her talented voice and engaging ways.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Buerkle, J. G.
motto: "He is one of those wise philanthropists who in a time of famine would vote for nothing but a supply of toothpicks."
description: Nevertheless, he delivered the Junior Class from insolvency.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Barton, Alma
motto: "To see her is to love her, And love but her forever, For Nature made her what she is And never made another."
description: Alma entered school as a Junior, but that irresistible charm of hers has already wrought its havoc.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Bird, Nell
motto: "'Tis beauty that doth oft make women proud, 'Tis virtue that doth make them most admired."
description: And "Nell" has all of these. She has been a leader in college, the orator of her class in her Junior year, and this year Editor-in-Chief of the Arkansan.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Armitage, Marguerite
motto: "And cloudy the day, or stormy the night, The sky of her heart was always bright."
description: "Pete" has found that cheerfulness and eternal good spirits are excellent things in woman—and in "Rita" in particular.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Blackshire, Deane
motto: "In many ways does the full heart reveal The presence of the love it would conceal!"
description: If it had not been for Deane, the Sapphic never would have been.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Banta, Katherine
motto: "Of manners gentle, of affections mild; In wit a woman, simplicity a child."
description: Katherine is an excellent student and has successfully filled more offices than any other member of the class.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Carnes, G. C.
motto: “A gentleman that loves to hear himself talk, and will speak more in a minute than he will stand to in a month.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Blackmun, Ora
motto: “Her heart and hand both open and both free; For what she has she gives, what thinks, she shows.”
description: She has made more E's than any other member of the class.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Wohra, Har Das
motto: “Unobtrusive and quiet, as shy as a maid Is desired to be, and of girls much afraid.”
description: He has won the name of eating degrees.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Carroll, H. A. D.
motto: “There is nothing ill can dwell in such a temple; If the ill spirit have so fair a house, Good things will strive to dwell with it.”
description: The boy that was lost in Carroll Cave.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Dyer, C. L.
motto: “I am not merry; but I do beguile The things I am by seeming otherwise.”
description: He is a great lover of music.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Dunn, W. A.
motto: "Oh wad some power the giftie gie us To see oursel's as others see us! It wad frae monie a blunder free us, And foolish notion."
clubs: President of A. S. M. E.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Dunn, H. W.
motto: "The paper dealer who has for his advertisement: 'If you want to get stung buy from me. If you want to get stung worse buy elsewhere.'"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Davenport, Bessie
motto: "Work, for the night is coming, Work, in the glowing sun, Work, while the dew is sparkling—" And then work some more.
description: Bess believes that rest comes only with old age.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Croom, S. G.
motto: "Wiser in his own conceit than seven men that can render a reason."
description: His most famous toast is "Scholarship as an Asset to Fraternities."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Casey, W. B.
motto: "He bore a mind that envy could not but call fair."
description: Bert makes E's even in Economics to Prof. Carothers.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Graham, J. J.
motto: "Whither, midst falling dew / Dost thou pursue / Thy solitary way?"
description: "Jesse" is known to few, but his only fault so far as we can find is that he comes from Springdale.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Gerig, F. A.
motto: "Thou wouldst be loved? Then let thy heart / From its present pathway part not!"
description: Frank, known generally as "Goat," has never shocked us much by anything, except his absolute constancy in love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Baker, M. S.
motto: "I tell thee, love is Nature's second sun, / Causing a spring of virtues where he shines."
description: Mabin's personality has been so wrapped up in that of another that it has distinguished itself for little else in the U. of A.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Berry, Margaret
motto: "Her sensibilities are so acute / The fear of being silent makes her mute."
description: Margaret sometimes talks, but it is in German or about it.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Hon, Mabel
motto: "And then she will talk, ye gods, how she will talk!"
description: "Mab" is not planning a career on the stage, but she has made a good beginning in Commencement plays.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Huntley, B. W.
motto: "When he acts piously, soberly, and temperately, he acts prudently and safely."
description: Bruce has won such a reputation on the football field that he needs none in anything else.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Hollobaugh, Essie
motto: "If you want knowledge you must toil for it; and if pleasure, you must toil for it. Toil is the law."
description: If Essie ever fails to do anything it will not be through low aim or lack of diligence.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Holt, M. L.
motto: "His sparkling surface scarce betrays a thoughtful tide beneath it rolled."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Hopper, I. C.
motto: "That which ordinary men are fit for, I am qualified in; and the best of me is diligence."
description: He is best known for his oratorical abilities and for the ease with which he learns.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Henry, E. A.
motto: "He faces the world unflinchingly."
description: "Gus" has done about everything in school from debating to making good grades and dancing the bear.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_08.png

name: English, E. H.
motto: "Can knowledge have no bound but must advance so far to make us wise for ignorance?"
description: If he succeeds as well in his profession as he has on the track, he will make a successful man.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Estes, G. D.
motto: "He slew our dragon, not, so seemed it, knew he had done more than any simplest man might do."
clubs: President, the Y. M. C. A.
description: "Good Old Dan" is the man who put Alpena Pass on the map. Known chiefly as a football star, he is also President of the Y. M. C. A., and has been an all-around man all through school.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Dowdle, R. G.
motto: "He was a beautiful creature, depending on this beauty for much of his authority over his fellows."
description: The most beautiful man in the class was in this case, the leading man. "Garland" was the President of the Class of '14.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Erwin, J. T.
motto: "Happy am I; from care I'm free! Why aren't they all contented like me?"
description: "Chili" is making a record on the baseball diamond.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Funk, Gladys
motto: "Whatever thy hand findeth to do, do it with all thy might."
description: Faithful work in all school life and notably in Y. W. C. A. has characterized Gladys' college course.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Keith, A. A.
motto: "Every man has his faults and honesty is his."
description: By his quiet and unassuming ways, Allen has gained many friends and lost none.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Humphreys, F. A.
motto: "Too young for love? Ah, say not so! Too young? Too young? Ah no! No! No!"
description: "Pats," like other men, his classmates, has been conspicuous for nothing until his Senior year—and then only for his meteor-like interest in a girl!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Kennedy, W. E.
motto: "He is never less at leisure than when at leisure."
description: The steam engine genius who made a reputation by keeping his mouth shut.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Jordan, Mary
motto: "A foot more light, a step more true, Ne'er from the heath-flower dash'd the dew!"
description: She has fallen in Love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Keller, Fred
motto: "His words, like so many nimble and airy servitors, trip about him at command."
description: He has done everything from writing love lyrics to winning inter-collegiate debates.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Laser, Lucile
motto: "She was so charitable and so piteous She would weep, if that she saw a mouse."
description: As the "Widow of the Deceased" in the famous trial of the State vs. Dexter S. Bush, Lucile proved herself a worthy member of the Law Club.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Lake, E. C.
motto: "A man of sovereign parts he is esteemed; Nothing becomes him ill that he would well."
description: Editor-in-Chief of the Cardinal in 1912-1913.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Lamberton, H. C.
motto: "He is of a very melancholy disposition."
description: The greatest thing that he has accomplished is his falling in love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_11.png

name: McPherson, R. R.
motto: "He hath not fed of the dainties that are bred in a book; he hath not eat paper, as it were; he hath not drunk ink."
description: What "Mac" doesn't know about Agriculture nobody knows.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Winfrey, J. S.
motto: "Yond Cyrus has a mild and gentle look, He dreams too much."
description: But in spite of his dreaming, the Arkansan and the library couldn't exist without him.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Magness, P. G.
motto: 'A comely old man as busy as a bee.'
description: At times his mind seems to wander—to Springfield for instance.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Mixon, H. D.
motto: 'Wisdom he has, and to his wisdom courage; Temper to that, and unto all success.'
description: Harvey has distinguished himself in everything he has ever undertaken; he is now Business Manager of the Arkansan.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Moorehead, Louise
motto: 'Great feelings hath she of her own, Which lesser souls may never know.'
description: With the spirit to do anything that she thought right and prudent, Louise has met everything in college with fearlessness. She has made herself known as a good public speaker on several occasions.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_12.png

name: McGaugh, Callie
motto: 'A thing of beauty is a joy forever.'
description: Callie is one of our most studious and earnest Seniors—the girl historian prodigy.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_12.png

name: McCarty, R. O.
motto: 'Flattery is the food of fools; Yet now and then your men of wit Will condescend to take a bit.'
description: 'Mac' is one of those changeable persons that you can't tell anything about.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_12.png

name: McGill, S. S.
motto: "Wit and wisdom are born with a man."
clubs: President of A. I. E. E.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_13.png

name: McGill, Minto
motto: "Man delights not me; no, nor woman neither."
description: Mr. Logan’s pet.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Metcalf, R. J.
motto: "Wise to resolve, and patient to perform."
description: The only Geology major in the class.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Moss, Mildred
motto: "We sometimes meet persons who in their very mien and aspect manifest such a signature and stamp of virtue as to make our judgment of them a matter of intuition."
description: Mildred has made one of the most brilliant records for scholarship in her class, and is Vice-President of the Class of ’14.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Payne, E. E.
motto: "He that hath knowledge spareth his words."
description: We have heard his voice seldom, except in connection with Rita.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Potter, G. C.
motto: "And what he greatly thought, he nobly dared."
description: A man from Kansas.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Potter, Winnie
motto: "The girl with that grave mathematical look (?)"
description: The Potters are known for their cheerfulness and mirth and Winnie ranks first.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Potter, Mabel
motto: "Can knowledge have no bound, but must advance so far to make us wish for ignorance?"
description: She was a Senior last year and liked it so well that she tried it again this year.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Potter, H. N.
motto: "Urge him with truth to frame his fair replies; and sure he will, for wisdom never lies."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Potter, R. L.
motto: "To heal divisions, to relieve th' oppress; in virtue rich; in blessing others, blest."
description: An Agri benedict.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Scurlock, E. H.
motto: "I have the spirit to do anything, that appears not foul in the truth of my spirit."
description: "Ed" has been business manager of almost everything in school—especially the Cardinal '13 and the Weekly.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Roys, M. B.
motto: "I've made it my practice to put all my worries down in the bottom of my heart, then set on the lid an' smile."
description: "Marco" has been this year a most enthusiastic and successful King of Rooters—one of the best we have ever had.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Quick, W. C.
motto: "Recognizes ever and anon the breeze of nature stirring in his soul."
description: President of the Agri Club.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Shelton, Wilma
motto: "What she wills to do or say is wisest, virtuousest, discreetest, best."
description: Her sweet disposition and high scholarship have won much admiration during her brief stay here.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Ratliff, E. M.
motto: "In the make and nature of every man, there are some powers for better things."
description: Who would have dreamed in "Rats" early career here that he would be a lady-killer? But see what his Senior year has brought him to.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Titus, I. R.
motto: "Just a little larger than your fist, Therefore so easy to be missed."
description: Ira has gained quite a reputation as a steeple-jack.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Shuffield, N. E.
motto: "He is the half part of a blessed man Left to be finished by such as she."
description: He has gained his reputation through his wife.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Schoolfield, Eunice
motto: "Her air, her manners, all who see admire; Courteous, though coy, and gentle, though retired."
description: Eunice cried because she didn't make E+ in Shakespeare. She is equally good in everything else, too.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Stout, S. R.
motto: "Every little movement has a meaning all its own—watch his eyes."
description: "Roddy" is captain of the baseball team and one of the star players.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Stewart, L. G.
motto: "We have left undone those things we should have done, and done those things we should not have done."
description: The University has seen little of him—as a student!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Waters, R. F.
motto: "By this face, This seeming brow of justice, did he win The hearts of all he did angle for."
description: He is by no means a thief, yet he manages to get control of most of the money that comes to the boys' dormitory.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Volentine, Paul
motto: "Mature in dullness from his tender years— Yet still the wretch's master bears the blame."
description: Paul has made an enviable record in football and is noted for his pep.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Trent, Ruth
motto: "A maiden never bold; Of a spirit so still and quiet that her motion Blushed at herself."
description: Ruth has distinguished herself only for modesty and unobtrusiveness.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Thornton, R. E.
motto: "A merrier man Within the limit of becoming mirth I never spent an hour's talk withal."
description: He is not in Arizona—but his heart is.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Tyson, H. J.
motto: "He can look into the seeds of plants And say which grain will grow and which will not."
description: Harvey is a farmer and it takes but a short time for anybody to find it out.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Alexander, Reba
motto: "A big, gracious heart—the verdict of all who know her."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Autrey, J. L.
motto: "Only one better grafter in the University and he's my partner."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Batten, J. T.
motto: "The law is a sort of hocus-pocus science that smiles in your face while it picks your pocket."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Bell, Susan
motto: "To know, to esteem, to love."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Bethel, Claude
motto: "God made the country and men made the town."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Bell, J. E.
motto: "Unforced with punishment, unawed by fear, His words were simple, and his soul sincere."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Blackshare, J. O.
motto: "He was a scholar, and a ripe and good one, Exceeding wise, fair spoken and persuading."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Bonner, E. C.
motto: "Hath Somnus brushed thy eyelids with his rod?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Browne, L. W.
motto: "He that hath a beard is more than a youth."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Cammack, G. S.
motto: "There's really nothing else to do, fellows, so let's study."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Cates, A. W.
motto: "Can any man have a higher notion of the rule of right and the eternal fitness of things?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Constant, Mabel
motto: "All eyes you draw, and with the eyes the heart."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Davidson, E. C.
motto: "The eternal feminine doth draw on us."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Davis, Lucile
motto: "An honest eye and a pleasant smile. What more could one desire?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Duncan, E. E.
motto: "Tho' modest, on his unembarrassed brow Nature hath written, 'Gentleman.'"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Dunn, J. H.
motto: "That man who hath a tongue is no man If with his tongue he cannot win a woman."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Ellis, R. A.
motto: "Some smack of age in you, some relish of the saltness of time."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Forrest, L. S.
motto: "If she undervalue me What care I how fair she be."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Forwood, Eleanor
motto: "And witty to talk with And pleasant too, to think on."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Garrett, Claude
motto: "Claude has social service aspirations."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Gibson, Ruth
motto: "Young in limbs, in judgment old."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gilliam, S. E.
motto: "Common sense is the most uncommon thing in existence."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gladson, Marion
motto: "In books, or work or healthful play."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gregg, R. C.
motto: "A man who's not afraid to say his say, Though a whole town's against him."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gregg, Pansy
motto: "Rich in saving common sense."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Greig, J. K.
motto: "Fond of learning, yet fonder of woman."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Goss, A. L.
motto: "His fame was great in all the land."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Hale, John J.
motto: "His line is the finest ever. He is a Junior by request."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Hall, W. L.
motto: "I was a goer in my day."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Harding, R. C.
motto: "And the whining schoolboy with his satchel And shining morning face, creeping like a snail Unwillingly to school."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Harville, A. W.
motto: "Hath thy toil o'er books consumed the midnight oil?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Hopper, D. C.
motto: "He could on either side dispute, Confute, change hands and still confute."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Huber, C. A.
motto: "Mankind have a great aversion to intellectual labor."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Hughes, Anna
motto: "It's guid to be merry and wise."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Hughes, Jewel
motto: "True genius, but true woman."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Hurlock, Leslie
motto: "Some are born great, some achieve greatness and some have greatness thrust upon them."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Johnson, Nelle
motto: "Lovely is the light Of a dark eye in woman."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Jones, M. F.
motto: "Trust in all things high comes easy to him."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Jordan, Pauline
motto: "Of fancy, reason, virtue naught can we bereave."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Joyner, J. E.
motto: "Remove not the ancient landmarks."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Kennard, R. P.
motto: “A vast and imperious mind and a heart large as the sands upon the sea shore.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Kilgore, Vesta
motto: “Begone, dull care. Thou and I shall never agree.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Knerr, Irene
motto: “Thou would’st be great, Art not without ambition, but without the illness that attend it.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Knoch, E. A.
motto: “Exhausting thought, And hiving wisdom with each studious year.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Lake, J. P.
motto: “One vast, substantial smile, Jabe is a royal fellow and popular.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Lee, A. W.
motto: “And still they gazed and still the wonder grew That one small head could carry all he knew.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Lee, R. D.
motto: “R. D. Lee, sir, of Hendrix College, sir; yes, sir.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Mccain, M. G.
motto: “Women and music should never be dated.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Mcfarlane, Margaurite
motto: “She doeth little kindness Which most leave undone or despise.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Mcfarlane, W. D.
motto: “A man he seems of cheerful yesterdays and confident tomorrows.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_22.png

name: McGill, W. G.
motto: "He was a verray perfight gentil Knight."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Mckinney, Ruth
motto: "Fair tresses man's imperial race ensnare, And beauty draws us with a single hair."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Moore, Lila
motto: "Of manners gentle, of affections mild."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Newton, N. K.
motto: "God said, 'Let Newton be,' and all was right."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Nelson, E. H.
motto: "His fame was great in all the land."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Owens, Marion
motto: "Looks wise, but you can't always sometimes tell."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Park, May
motto: "Doing good is the only certainly happy action."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Parsons, L. C.
motto: "Waited on the government with a claim to wear Sabers by the bucketful, rifles by the pair."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Pettigrew, Helen
motto: "A happy life is what the Muses love."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Philips, Bessie
motto: "For such a mind is contemplative and kind."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Porter, Florence
motto: "Good sense, which is only the gift of Heaven."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Pratt, Joy
motto: "Her deep blue eyes smile constantly."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Redus, Frank
motto: "Slumber is more sweet than toil."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Robinson, Evalyn
motto: "I thus neglecting worldly ends, all dedicated To closeness and bettering of my mind."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Scott, Ellen
motto: "Almost but not quite."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Smith, E. T.
motto: "Who can tell for what high cause This darling of the gods was born."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Stevenson, E. U.
motto: "The bed has been a place of luxury to me, I would not exchange it for all the thrones in the world."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Stewart, R.
motto: "A moral, sensible, and well-bred man."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Stone, Marion
motto: "From grave to gay, from levity to severe."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Stuckey, Helen
motto: "Happy am I; from care I'm free."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Thompson, L. E.
motto: "He was a man. Take him for all in all I shall not look on his like again."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Turner, A. S.
motto: "A faultless body and a blameless mind."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Walls, Louise
motto: "The daintiest last to make the end most sweet."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Williams, B. R.
motto: "I may justly say with the hook-nosed fellow of Rome, 'I came, I saw and overcame.'"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Watson, Damon
motto: "A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Wiggins, S. B.
motto: "Towering in the confidence of twenty-one."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Wilson, J. F.
motto: "Really a handsome and charming man."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Wommack, Harry
motto: "Let me wind my watch—then I'll have time."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1914.pdf_页面_25.png
